arts.ttl: Milan Worked Shrewdly, Beat Spurs for Marquee Signing
arts.sum: Santiago Gimenez has gotten off to a good start at Milan, hitting the net in his first two Serie A matches. The Rossoneri had to negotiate at length with Feyenoord to get the deal done, but they had set the stage in advance. Fikayo Tomori discusses Spurs snub in January window
arts.sum: Fikayo Tomori has discussed his decision to turn down a transfer to Tottenham Hotspur in the January transfer window. Tomori was a transfer target for Tottenham as Ange Postecoglou sought to strengthen his options at centre-back.
